content: There is a proposed documentation update to allow this. I assume our memory model already takes this into account but it may be worth noting https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/pull/128778.
Also Alice (and others) you may want to give your input on the recent pin ergonomics doc https://rust-lang.zulipchat.com/#narrow/stream/410673-t-lang.2Fmeetings/topic/Design.20meeting.202024-08-07
Yeah, I'm aware of Ralf's opinion on this and obiviously our own (LKMM) atomic support atomic read and normal read on the same memory location
